ch04_04_01$Say$NPC$nobody$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_001$「......」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_002$「那個，謝謝了......你也是被捲入哪裡的裂隙，才從這裡出來的？」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_003$我看著海潮逐漸復原，在一旁有些尷尬地朝少年搭話，一邊也確認傳訊玉符的信號。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_004$妖族的靈域網路在這裡還能收到訊號，看起來我應該沒有跑離內海太遠。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_005$簡單傳訊息報平安，接著我便也等待部下們的回報，看著大家的訊息陸續跳出。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_006$（千草跟白若丸平安無事，已經在搜索其他人了......太好了。）$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$NPC$nobody$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_007$「嗯，吾要去探親，在海邊遇上慾界裂隙......」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$NPC$nobody$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_008$「妳知道這裡是哪裡的海域？」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_009$「我想，應該是我們妖族的內海附近，畢竟我的傳訊玉符還有信號。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_010$「這位──神族的客人，你是在哪裡遇到裂隙的？」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$NPC$nobody$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_011$「吾也不清楚，但吾本來要往東洲海邊跟黃泉海的時空邊界前去，因為吾的弟弟住那。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_012${punch=0.08
column2: 0.2}{size=50}（會住在那種地方也太奇怪了吧！？）{/size}$$$

column1: ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_013$（──不過，會在那裡出沒的神明，大概只有傳聞中打從出生被高天原放逐的『{color=#FF1111}蛭子命{/color}』。）$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_014$綜合了一下男子口中的資訊，加上能使用月亮之力分開海洋潮流的豪橫神力，$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_015$男子的身分簡直昭然若揭，我也根本沒想到會在這種場合、這種地方遇見他。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_016$他是──『{color=#FF1111}月讀尊{/color}』。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_017$我素未蒙面的『{color=#FF1111}準盟友{/color}』，『{color=#FF1111}蛭子命{/color}』的哥哥，也是那位『{color=#FF1111}天照大神{/color}』的親弟弟。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_018$「那樣的話，我想您可能偏離目的地有點遠了呢，『月讀閣下』。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_019$「嗯，吾想也是。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_020$他有些不耐煩地抓抓兜帽下露出的前額劉海，$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_021$雖然看不到他的眼睛與表情，但仍能感受到他的焦躁。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_022$「借問一下，東方是哪？」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_023$「稍等，我用玉符替你確認下......」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_024$打開傳訊玉符的定位系統後，我指了個方向給他。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_025$「多謝。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_026$他點頭致意，便沒有多作停留的打算。$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_027$「呃──且慢，那裡是{size=50}正南方{/size}。」$$$
ch04_04_01$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_028$「......」$$$
ch04_04_02$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_031$「月讀閣下，我記得約十秒前才剛為您指過方向......」$$$
ch04_04_02$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_032$「這兩個方向有何不同？」$$$
ch04_04_03$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_033$「您身上沒有能測定方位的工具嗎？」$$$
ch04_04_03$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_034$「掉在裂隙了。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_035$「......」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_036$我總感覺他方向感不怎麼好的樣子......$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_037$鑒於他剛才多少算是替我解了圍，還有親切對待客人的原則，我決定稍微送他一程。$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_038$「您不介意的話，我帶您到邊界線吧！」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_039$「作為剛剛──您除掉那隻『深海之主』，幫我脫離危險的答謝。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_040$「吾只是順手。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_041$「不過，有勞妳了──吾想吾確實需要引路。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_042$「妳的名字？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_043$「%NAME%。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_044$「這名字，跟那位妖族聯盟的『輝夜姬』名字似乎一樣。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_045$「因為正是{size=50}本人{/size}。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_046$我尷尬又不失禮貌的微笑著說道，$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_047$他靜默了片刻，隨後評價道：$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_048$「吾沒想到會在這裡遇見妳。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_049$「雖然吾無意冒犯，但老實說公主出現在這裡......挺奇怪的。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_050$「這點算是彼此彼此？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_051$「老實說，我是和一群學者跟部下們來調查地質，順便也找找我家人的下落。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_052$「......家人？這種地方？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_053$「是啊，跟您一樣，為了家人而來。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_054$「但我家那個，可能跑到裂隙裡更深的地方，不好脫困。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_055$我傳了訊息告知部下們，自己會先往領海邊界線移動，$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_056$隨後便和月讀一道運起飛行咒術，向東南方前進──$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_057$大約兩刻鐘過去......$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_058$在抵達邊界線的時候，海岸邊有個小孩子坐在礁石邊，朝我們揮了揮袖子。$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_059$他的模樣十分可愛，但仔細一瞧卻會發現袖子底下空無一物，和服的衣襬下也不是人的雙足。$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$littleboy$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_060${punch=0.08
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_061$「蛭兒，你怎麼自己過來了？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_062$「因為蛭兒等了很久啊！我很擔心哥哥你又迷路了，最近海象不太平靜.....哥哥沒事嗎？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_063$「無礙，海裡的東西還傷不到我，倒是你跑上來沒問題？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_064$月讀飛降到礁石邊，蹲低身子和他弟弟交談。$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_065$雖然他的話語簡短又冷淡，甚至給人一種傲慢的感覺，$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_066$但對著他弟弟時卻分外溫和，倒是和開始給我的印象有些不同。$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_067$「當然沒問題，再怎麼說......我大概也算是『海神』的一種？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_068$「跟高天原的大家一樣，妖獸也不怎麼敢靠近我的。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_069$「對了，這個妖族的姐姐是......哥哥的朋友嗎？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_070$「不是。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_071$「但是，她是能被哥哥帶在身旁的女孩子？......那就是說，是{size=50}嫂嫂{/size}嗎？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_072$我被蛭子命無意之間迸出來的話語弄得一噎，當場嗆咳了起來──$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_073${punch=0.08
column2: 0.2}「咳咳咳！不、不是！我就是個負責帶路的路人......」$$$

column1: ch04_04_04$Say$NPC$LeechGod$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_074$「(低頭)喔......」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_075$為什麼我總感覺蛭子命一瞬間很失望的樣子？$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_076$或許是弟弟的失落太明顯，月讀輕柔地摸了摸他弟弟的頭，接著開口：$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_077$「她也不算路人。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_078$「？！」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_079$「她是妖族聯盟的『輝夜姬』，多少也算是月上世界的鄰居......」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char851$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_080$「何況做為預定結盟的對象，四捨五入後，大概也勉強算『朋友』的一種？」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_081${punch=0.08
column2: 0.2}（月讀閣下，鄰居就鄰居，說話請不要帶奇怪的停頓啊。）$$$

column1: ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_082${punch=0.08
column2: 0.2}（而且那個『四捨五入』和『勉強算朋友』是什麼意思？我們也還沒簽約呢！）$$$

column1: ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_083$雖然我在內心吐槽不已，$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$Narrator$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_084$但我還是表面平靜的飛降到兩人身邊，對著蛭子命微笑自我介紹：$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_085$「初次見面，蛭子命閣下──我是%NAME%，是妖族聯盟的『輝夜姬』。」$$$
ch04_04_04$Say$char1$$FALSE$FALSE$$$$$DidNotPlay$Main01_ch04_04_086$「如你哥哥所說，我們是『準盟友』的關係，因為正好遇見了──就送他一程而已。」$$$
